sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74215" key="o)chli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξηλίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a plant (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀξαλίς</foreign> II), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
